idea-plugin.name: Roo Code (CE)
idea-plugin.description:
Roo Code (CE) - Production-Ready AI Coding Assistant

Roo Code (CE) is a high-performance, community-driven edition of the Roo Code AI assistant for IntelliJ-based IDEs. It provides a stable and feature-rich environment to run VSCode-based coding agents like Roo Code and Cline directly within your favorite development environment.

🚀 Why Roo Code (CE)?

While other versions may suffer from instability, this Community Edition is dedicated to providing a professional-grade experience:

  • Truly Usable: Fixed critical JCEF timing bugs, editor concurrency deadlocks, memory leaks, and multi-window UI freezes.
  • Feature Parity: Full support for Checkpoints, Problem Selectors, Worktrees, and MCP—ensuring the JetBrains experience matches the VSCode original.
  • Production Ready: Deeply optimized for professional use, including first-class support for PyCharm and multi-window workflows.

🛠️ Core Features

  • VSCode Agent Compatibility: Seamlessly run VSCode-based coding agents (Roo Code, Cline, etc.)
  • Deep IDE Integration: Native tool windows, editor context actions, and integrated terminal support.
  • AI-Powered Assistance: Leverage advanced AI models for autonomous coding, refactoring, and debugging.

💻 Supported IDEs

  • IntelliJ IDEA (Ultimate & Community)
  • PyCharm (Professional & Community)
  • WebStorm, PhpStorm, RubyMine, CLion, GoLand, DataGrip, Rider, Android Studio

📌 Requirements

  • Requires Node.js v18+ installed on your system
  • Requires IDE version 2023.1 or later for optimal compatibility


Note: Roo Code (CE) is an independent community project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by JetBrains or RooCode, Inc.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 3.51.1.2

  • Feat: enable debug logging and add markdown preview command support

Version 3.51.1.1

  • Feat: rename internal components from Wecoder to RooCode (CE） to avoid conflicts with other coders
  • Support Roo Cloud

Version 3.51.1

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.51.1
  • Support worktrees

Version v3.50.5

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.50.5

Version v3.45.0

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.45.0

Version 3.41.3

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.41.3

Version 3.39.3

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.39.3

Version 3.36.16

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.16

Version 3.36.14

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.14

Version 3.36.11

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.11

Version 3.36.5

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.5

Version 3.36.2

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.36.2

Version 3.35.4

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.35.4
  • Fix: fix jcef timing issue at initialization

Version 3.34.6

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.34.6
  • Fix: fix jcef timing issue at initialization

Version 3.34.1

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.34.1
  • Fix: support PyCharm and stabilize WebView UI

Version 3.33.3

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.33.3
  • Fix: resolve editor concurrency issues

Version 3.33.1

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.33.1
  • Fix: resolve multi-window UI freeze

Version 3.33.0

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.33.0
  • Feat: Add checkpoint feature support
  • Fix: theme manager initialization

Version 3.32.1

  • Upgrade roo-code to 3.32.1
  • Feat: support problem selector

Version 3.28.16

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.28.16
  • Feat: support keymap and i18n

Version 3.28.15

  • Upgrade roo-code to v3.28.15
  • Fix: support dumb mode completely

Version 32.28.7

  • Upgrade roo-code to v32.28.7
  • Update toolwindow actions and icons

Version 32.28.2

  • Upgrade roo-code vsix to v32.28.7
  • Fix: fix ClassCastException issue when plugin reactivated
  • Fix: fix unacknowledgedCount issue
  • Fix: normalize file path separators for cross-platform compatibility
  • Fix: change logging level for debugging info

Version 32.25.17

  • Upgrade roo-code vsix to v32.25.17
  • Update build.sh and release RooCode zip instead of RunVSAgent

Version 32.25.11

  • Upgrade roo-code vsix to v32.25.11
  • Refactor project with Roo Code (CE) branding

action.description: Roo Cloud settings and task synchronization
